featured.title: Odyssey
featured.description: A complete travel planning platform with hotel booking, itineraries, and reservations. Secured APIs using JWT and deployed via Railway.
features: JWT-secured REST API with Spring Boot backend
Hotel booking and itinerary management system
Responsive React frontend with real-time reservation tracking

grid.title: PHH Quotation Portal
grid.description: Part of an ERP system where users can request quotations and the system generates them automatically or manually, with full admin control over items and site management.
features: Quotation request and auto/manual generation
Quotation download as PDF
Materials and product details management
Admin panel for item management and site control

grid.title: VoiceDocs AI
grid.description: Documentation professionals spend too much time typing and manually formatting content. VoiceDocs AI solves this by letting users dictate content through speech, instantly refine it with AI-powered editing, and organize all outputs in a built-in file manager turning raw speech into polished, structured documents without ever touching a keyboard.
features: Speech-to-text using Nova STT with English and Russian language support
AI-powered text editing with custom prompts and built-in presets
Presets: clear text, rewrite in book style, reorganize and extract main points
In-app file manager to save, organize, and revisit processed documents
Multi AI API integration for flexible and accurate text refinement

grid.title: Cargo Connect
grid.description: Managing a haulage fleet across multiple drivers, vehicles, and routes creates blind spots dispatchers lose track of assets in real time and reporting becomes a manual nightmare. Cargo Connect solves this with a centralized fleet management platform that gives operations teams live vehicle tracking, geofencing alerts, and automated reporting, while drivers, trailers, and containers are all managed from a single dashboard.
features: Real-time vehicle and driver location tracking via Google Maps and Socket.io
Geofencing with automated alerts when assets enter or leave defined zones
Fleet management for drivers, vehicles, trailers, and containers with full CRUD
Interactive dashboards and exportable reports with Google Charts
Push notifications via Firebase, SMS via Nexmo, and email alerts via Nodemailer
PDF export for reports and delivery documents
JWT authentication with role-based route protection
File uploads to AWS S3 for documents and media

grid.title: Cargo Connect — Driver App
grid.description: Truck drivers on the road need a reliable way to receive jobs, confirm deliveries, and stay in sync with operations without calling back to base for every update. The Cargo Connect driver app puts the full job lifecycle in the driver's hands: from accepting a job and completing pre-trip checklists, to capturing photo proof of delivery and reporting maintenance issues, all synced in real time with the operations dashboard.
features: Job management — view, accept, start, and complete haulage jobs on the go
Photo proof capture for containers, trailers, seals, and consignment notes
Pre-task compliance checklist required before starting any job
Driver availability toggle synced live to the operations backend
Maps integration for pickup and drop-off navigation
In-app notifications and real-time operations alerts
Maintenance request submission with photo attachments
Leave application and management from within the app
Tap-to-call contacts for pickup and drop-off locations
